entities.name: COACHING_NOTES.md
entities.context: File containing baseline protocols for different session types

entities.name: Baseline Protocol
entities.context: Predefined exercise prescription (sets/reps) used as the reference standard for a training session

entities.name: Session Type
entities.context: Classification of a training session that determines which baseline protocol to load

entities.name: Exercise Comparison Framework
entities.context: Five-category classification system for comparing actual exercises against baseline: Completed, Modified, Skipped, Substituted, Added

entities.name: Step 2: Compare Against Baseline
entities.context: A defined step in V's workout logging or review pipeline that reconciles actual performance with prescribed protocol

relationships.context: Loads the baseline protocol from COACHING_NOTES.md to perform the comparison
The comparison step evaluates each exercise against the baseline prescription
Applies the five-category classification (Completed, Modified, Skipped, Substituted, Added) to each exercise
Each session type has a corresponding baseline protocol that defines prescribed exercises
